title: Plan for successful cultural practice at work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan for successful cultural practice at work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Analyse essential features of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander families and cultures

pcs.text: Access and review information about Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander social history up to the present time
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review information about Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander social history up to the present time?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review information about Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander social history up to the present time.

pcs.text: Research and document concepts including the Dreaming, connection to Country and other Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document concepts including the Dreaming, connection to Country and other Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document concepts including the Dreaming, connection to Country and other Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural practice.

pcs.text: Identify and record traditional and contemporary social structures of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander families and societies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record traditional and contemporary social structures of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander families and societies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record traditional and contemporary social structures of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander families and societies.

pcs.text: Research and document elements of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander societies and use to inform interactions with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document elements of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander societies and use to inform interactions with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document elements of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander societies and use to inform interactions with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Analyse essential features of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander families and cultures

elements.title: Review changes to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander societies since British colonisation

pcs.text: Research and document colonisation and the impacts on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document colonisation and the impacts on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document colonisation and the impacts on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People.

pcs.text: Analyse personal responses to information about the positive and negative effects of British colonisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse personal responses to information about the positive and negative effects of British colonisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse personal responses to information about the positive and negative effects of British colonisation.

pcs.text: Report findings of the impacts of British colonisation, settlement and historical government policies on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People to organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report findings of the impacts of British colonisation, settlement and historical government policies on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People to organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report findings of the impacts of British colonisation, settlement and historical government policies on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People to organisation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Review changes to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander societies since British colonisation

elements.title: Identify government efforts to address continuing effects of colonisation

pcs.text: Identify and document current processes involved in government consultation with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People, Communities and organisations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document current processes involved in government consultation with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People, Communities and organisations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document current processes involved in government consultation with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People, Communities and organisations.

pcs.text: Investigate and report on effectiveness of a chosen government policy through Community consultation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and report on effectiveness of a chosen government policy through Community consultation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and report on effectiveness of a chosen government policy through Community consultation.

pcs.text: Develop strategies for addressing stereotyping and assumptions in relation to the chosen policy in consultation with local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community and Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies for addressing stereotyping and assumptions in relation to the chosen policy in consultation with local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community and Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies for addressing stereotyping and assumptions in relation to the chosen policy in consultation with local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community and Cultural Authorities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify government efforts to address continuing effects of colonisation

elements.title: Apply understanding of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and identity to daily work routines

pcs.text: Identify and record features of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record features of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record features of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Investigate how protocols are expressed in daily work life to inform workplace relationships and interactions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate how protocols are expressed in daily work life to inform workplace relationships and interactions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate how protocols are expressed in daily work life to inform workplace relationships and interactions.

pcs.text: Identify and analyse the obligations of cultural maintenance in relation to a work issue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and analyse the obligations of cultural maintenance in relation to a work issue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse the obligations of cultural maintenance in relation to a work issue.

pcs.text: Develop strategies to support absences due to cultural practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies to support absences due to cultural practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies to support absences due to cultural practices.

pcs.text: Work through and deal with workplace conflicts in culturally appropriate ways
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work through and deal with workplace conflicts in culturally appropriate ways?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work through and deal with workplace conflicts in culturally appropriate ways.

pcs.text: Develop possible strategies for cultural maintenance in work and the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop possible strategies for cultural maintenance in work and the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop possible strategies for cultural maintenance in work and the workplace.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Apply understanding of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and identity to daily work routines

elements.title: Plan and support culturally appropriate work practices

pcs.text: Develop a vision and workplace goals for own work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a vision and workplace goals for own work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a vision and workplace goals for own work.

pcs.text: Identify and discuss common culturally inappropriate work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and discuss common culturally inappropriate work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and discuss common culturally inappropriate work practices.

pcs.text: Develop strategies to change these practices collaboratively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies to change these practices collaboratively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies to change these practices collaboratively.

pcs.text: Develop an implementation and evaluation plan for the strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop an implementation and evaluation plan for the strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop an implementation and evaluation plan for the strategies.

pcs.text: Support ways in which Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander practitioners can effect change to create greater cultural awareness in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Support ways in which Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander practitioners can effect change to create greater cultural awareness in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Support ways in which Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander practitioners can effect change to create greater cultural awareness in the workplace.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Plan and support culturally appropriate work practices
